LIBRARY_OF_RUINA_STAGGER_RESISTANCE_POWE: Attack cards and non-ability unblocked damage reduce this resistance. At 0, immediately stuns and restores next turn.

[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] has [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Stagger Resistance. Attack cards and non-ability unblocked damage reduce it. At 0, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is immediately [gold]stunned[/gold] and gains [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. At the start of its next turn, restore full resistance.
DAMAGE_TYPE_RESISTANCE_POWER.title: Damage Type Resistance
DAMAGE_TYPE_RESISTANCE_POWER.description: Damage and chaos damage loss are multiplied based on the attack type.
